# Flamki

> Portfolio of Ayush S. Singh, a full stack developer building AI tools, web apps, automation, and fast product experiments.

Canonical URL: https://flamki.com/

## Identity

- Name: Ayush S. Singh
- Brand/site: Flamki
- Role: Full Stack Developer
- Focus: full stack web applications, AI tools, automation systems, small SaaS products, and product experiments.

## Important Pages

- Home and interactive portfolio: https://flamki.com/
- Sitemap: https://flamki.com/sitemap.xml

## Summary

Flamki is the personal portfolio of Ayush S. Singh. The site presents Ayush as a full stack developer and includes an interactive chat-style portfolio for learning about his work, projects, skills, and contact options.
